description_long: This bed features a prominent, elevated headboard that rises above the mattress, providing a supportive backrest. The frame is solid and rectangular, with a low profile and a flat, broad base that supports the mattress. The silhouette suggests a modern platform design, with clean lines and no visible legs or under-bed clearance. The foot of the bed is lower and squared off, lacking any decorative elements or footboard. The mattress appears thick and plush, likely offering a comfortable sleeping surface. The overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern platform bed with a tall headboard, thick mattress, and a solid, rectangular frame. The design is clean and functional, with a low foot and no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall headboard and the narrow width of the bed.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elevated headboard and the gradual slope of the mattress towards the foot.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat, squared-off foot of the bed and the solid frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the headboard prominence and the mattress profile.
